title: Ender Crystal
description: This mod adds more ores, tree types and more!This mod adds more ores, tree types and more!
body:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All the features are in early development they are only for creative for now, we will make more survival

friendly later in 2025.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to Ender crystal this mod adds alot of new stuff!

The enderite stuff is more powerful than Netherite!

Be careful! by hitting the glitched human will crash your game!

We are fixing the crash issue...

This mod adds a new material called Ender crystal! this can be smelted and crafted into tools and armor! Its stronger than netherite!



This is not the final version we will update every 2 months!

THIS MOD IS DISCONTINUED!
